title: HIV.G Diagnostics
description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the workflow for diagnostics for HIV (HIV.G)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVGDiagnostics logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVGDiagnostics logical model

baselineCd4Count.description: CD4 count performed at HIV diagnosis

dateOfBaselineCd4CountSampleCollection.description: Date and time when baseline CD4 count test sample was collected

lateArtInitiation.description: The client's first CD4 count from baseline CD4 test performed (such as at HIV diagnosis) was a count of less than 200 cells/mm3

dateOfCd4SampleCollection.description: Date sample to be used for CD4 count was collected

viralLoadTestConducted.description: A viral load test was performed

dateOfViralLoadSampleCollection.description: Date and time when the sample was collected to test the client's HIV viral load

dateOfFirstViralLoadSampleCollection.description: Date and time when the sample was collected to test the client's HIV viral load for the first time

dateViralLoadSampleSent.description: Date viral load sample sent to the lab

firstViralLoadTestResult.description: Result from the initial viral load test in number of copies/mL

viralLoadTestResult.description: Result from the viral load test in number of copies/mL

hivViralLoadSpecimenType.description: The type of specimen to be used to test viral load

hbsagTestDate.description: Date client was tested for hepatitis B virus (HBV)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.G.DE22

reasonHepatitisBTestNotConducted.description: Reason why a hepatitis B test was not done

hepatitisCScreeningDate.description: Date when client was screened for HCV

hepatitisCTestOrdered.description: Hepatitis C test has been ordered

hepatitisCTestConducted.description: Whether a hepatitis C test was conducted

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.G.DE35

reasonHepatitisCTestNotDone.description: Reason why a hepatitis C test was not done

hcvTestDate.description: Date client was tested for hepatitis C virus (HCV antibody, HCV RNA or HCV core antigen)

hcvTestResult.description: Hepatitis C virus test result (HCV antibody, HCV RNA or HCV core antigen)

hcvViralLoadTestDate.description: Hepatitis C viral load test date

hcvViralLoadTestResult.description: Hepatitis C viral load test result (qualitative)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.G.DE55

syphilisTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for syphilis (treponema pallidum)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.G.DE62

reasonSyphilisTestNotDone.description: Reason why a syphilis test was not done

otherTestsConducted.description: If the health worker performed other tests on the woman that are not explicitly listed in the application, select 'yes' here and fill in the details below.

otherTestsName.description: Input the name of other test(s) that were done.

otherTestsDate.description: Input the date of other test(s) that were done.

otherTestsResults.description: Input the result from the test(s).
